title: Build your first Android app in AI Studio in 5 minutes
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build a native Android photography app in five minutes using Google AI Studio and Gemini 3.5 Flash. The video covers initial prompting, app prototyping, sideloading to devices, and debugging including photo orientation fixes.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building a native Android photography app in about five minutes using Google AI Studio and Gemini 3.5 Flash. It covers the full loop from initial prompting and app prototyping to sideloading the result onto devices. The debugging segment addresses photo orientation fixes, and the workflow illustrates prompt engineering, code generation, and rapid prototyping in practice.
